title: EQ - Reset EQ and Save EQ becomes active only after moving slider
scenario: Reset EQ and Save EQ buttons remain disabled until a slider is adjusted in Custom EQ settings
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Observe the Reset EQ and Save EQ buttons
Without moving any slider, check if Reset EQ and Save EQ buttons are enabled or disabled
Move any slider in the Custom EQ settings
Observe the Reset EQ and Save EQ buttons again
expected: Reset EQ and Save EQ buttons should be disabled (greyed out) when no slider adjustment has been made, and become enabled/active only after the user moves any slider in the Custom EQ settings.
